svg.title: S25 and S26 annual service-quality comparison
svg.desc: Annual line-level punctuality and reliability for S25 and S26 compared with the whole network. The final point is the observed 2026 year-to-date window.

text.style: fill: #138a70; font: 800 11px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 1.5px;

line.style: fill: none; stroke: #627487; stroke-width: 3; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-dasharray: 7 6;

text.style: fill: #627487; font: 600 12px Aptos, Segoe UI, sans-serif;
